hypothesis:
## Novel Hypothesis

**Hypothesis:** Ensemble consensus-based semi-supervised learning will exhibit enhanced transferability to out-of-distribution molecular scaffolds compared to traditional supervised learning, such that individual models trained with ensemble consensus on in-domain unlabeled data will maintain superior predictive accuracy on structurally dissimilar molecules relative to equivalently-sized supervised ensembles, due to the consensus mechanism implicitly learning more generalizable molecular representations rather than overfitting to scaffold-specific patterns in the limited labeled data.
